name: SerpAPI Search
description: Search Google with SerpAPI for prices, shopping results, and web search. Includes shopping and web search tools.

apiKey.description: SerpAPI API key (or set SERPAPI_KEY env var)

defaultGl.description: Default country code (e.g., 'in' for India, 'us' for USA)

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)
